topics.query_ar: شرح مشكلة المنتج والمستهلك Producer Consumer problem سيمافور نظم تشغيل
topics.reason: Students struggle to correctly order wait() and signal() operations to prevent race conditions and deadlocks.

topics.query_en: Readers writers problem operating system starvation prevention
topics.query_ar: شرح Readers Writers problem نظم تشغيل بالعربي
topics.reason: Managing multiple readers while ensuring writers do not suffer from starvation requires complex state tracking and multiple mutexes.

topics.query_en: Dining philosophers problem deadlock avoidance operating systems
topics.query_ar: شرح مشكلة الفلاسفة Dining Philosophers problem deadlock بالعربي
topics.reason: Visualizing circular wait and implementing asymmetric solutions or resource hierarchy to prevent deadlocks is conceptually challenging.

topics.query_ar: شرح Monitors and Condition Variables نظم تشغيل بالعربي
